nit_title: CRPF Notice Inviting Tender — Supply and Installation of Security Equipment

criteria.name: Average Annual Turnover
criteria.description: Bidder must have Average Annual Turnover of ≥ ₹5,00,00,000 (Five Crores) during the last three financial years, certified by a Chartered Accountant.

criteria.name: Similar Works Experience
criteria.description: Bidder must have successfully completed at least 3 similar works of nature during the last 5 years, with each work valued at ≥ ₹10 Lakh.

criteria.name: GST Registration
criteria.description: Bidder must have a valid GST Registration Certificate (GSTIN) as per GST Act 2017.

criteria.name: EMD / Bank Guarantee
criteria.description: Bidder must submit Earnest Money Deposit (EMD) of ≥ ₹5,00,000 via Bank Guarantee, valid for ≥ 45 days beyond bid opening date.

criteria.name: Near Relations Declaration
criteria.description: Bidder must submit a self-declaration affidavit confirming that no near relatives are employed in CRPF in a position to influence the tender evaluation.

criteria.name: Integrity Pact
criteria.description: Bidder must submit the signed CRPF standard Integrity Pact document as per the template provided with the NIT.
